.clickable-icon::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button::b.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button::b.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.nav-files-container.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #bdbebd 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#bdbebd, color-mix(in srgb, #bdbebd 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #bdbebd 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#bdbebd, color-mix(in srgb, #bdbebd 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.inline-title.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 122, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(189, 190, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(72, 94, 48, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
